candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches top-line sales and equals Total income figures.
Duplicate total of Operating revenue; kept as fallback in case of label changes.
Alternative revenue label specific to vessel revenue if used in some years; added as lower-priority fallback.

variables.notes: Operating revenue is the main top-line. Total income is a duplicate total with identical numbers, kept as a secondary option. Revenue, Vessels is included as a tertiary fallback if the main label changes over time.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and change in inventory
candidates.why: Explicit production-related cost line; directly matches cost of goods sold concept.
Likely direct operating costs but appears unused (all nan in preview); kept as a low-priority alternative.
Likely direct operating costs related to vessels, but appears unused in preview; low-priority alternative.
Likely direct voyage operating costs; appears unused; low-priority alternative.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and change in inventory

variables.notes: Cost of goods and change in inventory is clearly the main COGS line. Other candidate direct cost lines either have no data in the preview or are more specific, so the single main line is used.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type label; even if currently nan, it likely captures part of overhead in some years.
Administrative overhead; appropriate SG&A component even if currently nan.
Operating revenue, not an expense; should NOT be included for SG&A.
Equity reserve, not an expense; should NOT be included for SG&A.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The provided SG&A candidate list misses major overhead components that clearly appear in the income statement. Key recurring operating overhead items without 'Total'/'Balancing' in their names and excluding COGS, D&A, impairments, interest, and taxes have been selected: Employee benefits; Other Expenses; Advertising Expense; Rental Expenses; Other Other Expenses; Marketing & Administrative Expenses; multiple detailed administration/audit/lease-related overhead lines. These collectively represent SG&A-type operating expenses. Manual review is recommended to confirm that none of these items are (i) part of COGS or (ii) classified differently in earlier years, and to verify whether any additional overhead lines should be included or excluded based on full-statement context. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee benefits, [Income Statement] Other Expenses, [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Rental Expenses, [Income Statement] Other Other Expenses, [Income Statement] Audit Fees, [Income Statement] Audit Related Fees, [Income Statement] Tax Fees, [Income Statement] Other Fees, [Income Statement] Short-Term Lease Cost, [Income Statement] Low value assets, [Income Statement] Variable Financial Lease Expenses, [Income Statement] Rental Expense
No research and development-related line items are apparent in the provided income statement or balance sheet. XRD is set to 0 by leaving the selection empty.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line with consistent negative values; best match for gross interest expense.
Component of interest expense separate from lease-related interest; good alternate label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant interest expense component.
Generic interest expense label (appears supplemental); kept as a fallback in case of label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental presentation of lease interest; lowest-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: XINT is treated as a single interest expense line that may change label over time. The priority list starts with the main 'Interest expenses' line, then other clearly related interest expense components and supplemental labels.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Explicit parent/owner equity line, which excludes non-controlling interests; ideal for book equity denominator.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; used only if parent-only equity were unavailable.
Appears to be mislabeled line containing only NCI figures; not appropriate for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Book equity (BE) should exclude non-controlling interests. The line 'Attributable to equity holders of the parent' provides exactly the parent/owner equity amount, so it is used alone.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; provides the minority equity needed for the denominator.
Income statement flow of profit to NCI, not the balance sheet equity; not suitable for MIB stock measure.
Alternative income statement label for NCI profit share; also a flow, not stock.

variables.notes: Minority interest (MIB) is mapped to the balance sheet stock of Non-Controlling Interests. Income statement NCI lines represent flows and are not used for the equity denominator.
